Metadata Value: Country-specific commodity price indices, including export, import, and terms-of-trade indices. For each country, the change in the international price of up to 45 individual commodities is weighted using commodity-level trade data. See “Commodity Terms of Trade: A New Database,” by Bertrand Gruss and Suhaib Kebhaj, for further details.

The country-specific indices are constructed using, alternatively, time-varying weights (using average trade flows over the precedingthree years) and fixed weights (based on average trade flows over several decades).
The data are monthly, based on 45 commodities and going back to 1980 (recent); and annual, based on 40 commodities and going backto 1962 (historical).
Data are updated in line with the WEO cycle.
